title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 43.409 - Registrar and school to be notified when missing child is located
text:
43.409.  Registrar and school to be notified when missing child is located. — Upon learning of the recovery of a missing child, the patrol shall notify the registrar and any school previously informed of the child's disappearance.  Thereupon, both the registrar and the school shall remove the mark from the child's records.
(L. 1988 H.B. 1272, et al.)
